title: Basil Falcinelli
text: Home * People * Basil Falcinelli Basil Falcinelli , a programmer in the internet security , Internet privacy and cryptocurrency open source community [1] affiliated with ReQrypt.org [2] , also involved in computer chess. He introduced and published a Linux port of the Gull 3 chess engine [3] , which subsequently evolved to LazyGull [4] , further incorporating his Fathom Syzygy tablebase probing tool [5] .
